scenes.text: Long ago, in the kingdom of Eldoria, a great darkness began to stir...
From the depths of the Forgotten Mines, twisted creatures emerged, spreading fear across the land.
The king has called upon brave adventurers to venture into the mines and put an end to the evil once and for all.
You awake in the village of Oakhaven. The morning air is crisp, carrying the scent of smoke from a nearby fire.
The villagers gather in the town square. A weathered notice board bears the king's seal — a call for heroes.
An old merchant approaches your party. 'So you're the ones? The mines lie east of here. Be careful — few who enter ever return.'
